name: Board report — bilingual (EN + ES)
description: Generate a Board-level committee report from ALM Decision run output. Must include all required sections: executiveSummary (≤150 words), financialPosition, interestRateRisk, creditConcentration, liquidityRisk, peerComparison, recommendations[], regulatoryCalendar[]. Language: bilingual. Tests completeness of the narrative pipeline and bilingual enforcement.
